title: Black PvP-x Gold
description: All new black themed texture pack to help with pvp experience
body:
# Black PvP-X Gold 

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

Black PvP-xGold is a sleek, high-contrast PvP texture pack designed for sharp visuals and maximum focus. Featuring a predominantly black aesthetic with striking gold accents, this pack delivers clean particle effects, optimized textures, low-fire, and dark GUIs to give you an edge in competitive play. Perfect for players who want a minimal yet bold look without sacrificing performance.

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)


![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d570d35701f0a60c8cc83b1cfd1242e2c6f12ead.gif)
